event_analyses.forward_looking: OI限额占比从昨日101.34%升至112.65%，持续恶化。空头占优但多空博弈激烈。建议：1）立即执行限额下调评估；2）排查大户85408254（8仓位LONG）动向；3）考虑限制新增开仓。

causal_chain.name: 结构性弱点
causal_chain.description: PROVE流通盘薄，少数大户可显著影响OI

evidence_table.title: P0 Mar 27 持仓变化（数仓实查 pt=2026032700~09）

causal_chain.name: OI限额突破加剧（112.65%）
causal_chain.description: OI/平台限额从昨日101.34%升至112.65%，偏离从327%扩大至188%（因基数变大）
causal_chain.risk_assessment: 限额占比持续上升是严重信号。建议立即下调限额或限制新增开仓。

causal_chain.name: 资金费率持续异常
causal_chain.description: 资金费率在Mar 27仍为负值（-0.075%），连续多期空头支付多头

causal_chain.name: 涉事用户持仓集中

evidence_table.title: P0 PROVE Top 5 涉事用户（数仓实查 pt=20260326）

causal_chain.risk_assessment: 多个用户权益/交易量比率极低（<0.001%）。4335832权益仅$1.45但交易量1040万，需重点调查是否存在操控行为。

event_analyses.executive_summary: NFLX永续合约OI偏离24H均值632.38%（阈值20%），为当日最大偏离事件。当前价格$93.76（24h +1.6%），OI仅315.469999999999999张。持仓用户以SHORT为主（15个仓位中10个SHORT），涉及South Korea、Pakistan、Iraq等多国用户。
event_analyses.forward_looking: NFLX OI基数极小（315张），微量仓位变动即可造成巨大百分比偏离。建议：1）监控OI是否继续扩大；2）关注21607391（South Korea, 2 SHORT）和70200254（Iraq）的后续操作。

causal_chain.name: OI基数极低
causal_chain.description: NFLX-USDT-SWAP OI仅约315张，极小量仓位变动即可造成632%偏离

causal_chain.name: OI偏离632.38%
causal_chain.description: OI较24H均值偏离632.38%，远超20%阈值，为当日所有标的中最高

causal_chain.name: 多国用户集中做空

evidence_table.title: P0 NFLX 涉事用户（数仓实查）

causal_chain.risk_assessment: 多国用户同时做空NFLX，部分用户（Pakistan, Iraq）来自高风险司法管辖区。需调查是否存在协同操作。

event_analyses.executive_summary: XAU-USD合约连续第2天触发Z cap硬顶限价保护。Mar 27原始18条报警（去重3条），频率进一步上升。当前价格$4436.6（24h -1.6%）。问题在于限价参数未适应黄金近期走势。
event_analyses.forward_looking: 建议立即上调XAU-USD的Z cap参数。连续2天高频触发说明当前参数已严重滞后于市场。

causal_chain.name: Z cap连续2天触发
causal_chain.description: Mar 26: 6条（去重2条），Mar 27: 20条（去重4条），频率持续升高
causal_chain.risk_assessment: 连续2天触发且频率升高，说明参数调整刻不容缓。

chapters.title: Price Limit Review
chapters.summary: Scanned 1498 instruments. Found 43 issue(s) across 4 rules.

rule_blocks.title: Buffer Too Tight
rule_blocks.description: Flags instruments where the EMA-derived limit price is already breaching or very close to the Y cap boundary, indicating the buffer is too tight for current market conditions.

rule_blocks.title: Asymmetric Basis
rule_blocks.description: Flags perp instruments where the EMA basis is large relative to the Z cap, suggesting the cap should be widened on one side to accommodate the persistent premium/discount.

rule_blocks.title: Asset-Type Consistency
rule_blocks.description: Checks whether each instrument's Y/Z caps are consistent with the standard ranges for its asset type classification.

rule_blocks.title: Z Cap <= Y Cap
rule_blocks.description: The Z (index) cap must always be strictly greater than the Y (limit) cap. If Z <= Y the price limit hierarchy is broken.
